# consistency-fix — Full codebase audit and stale reference cleanup

*Compaction generated by Vibuzo on 2026-06-05*
────────────────────────────────────────
## Goal
Audit the entire codebase for consistency after the deprecated commands cleanup — ensure all files reference the correct commands (/spec instead of /implement, /plan, /tasks, /review), agent descriptions are accurate, mirrors are in sync, and all stale references are purged.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Audit all active files: commands/, agents/, .opencode/ mirrors, context/, AGENTS.md, README.md
- Fix only stale/incorrect references — touch nothing else
- Verify source-mirror consistency for agent descriptions

## Progress
### Done
- **Stale mirror files deleted**: `.opencode/commands/implement.md`, `plan.md`, `review.md`, `tasks.md` (mirror copies of deleted commands — were left over from earlier sync)
- **Vibuzo mirror description fixed**: `.opencode/agent/core/vibuzo.md` — "Delegates /implement to Deepveloper" → "Delegates via /spec to Deepveloper"
- **Deepveloper mirror description fixed**: `.opencode/agent/core/deepveloper.md` — "triggered only by /implement subtask" → "triggered only as a subtask via /spec"
- **`agents/vibuzo.md` fixed**: 3 stale refs — rule 3 (/implement → via /spec), table (removed /plan, /review), gate 6 (removed /plan reference)
- **`opencode.jsonc` description fixed**: stale /implement ref → via /spec
- **README.md fixed**: tree diagram stale /implement ref → via /spec
- **`.opencode/prompts/vibuzo.txt` fixed**: 6 stale references (same pattern as agents/vibuzo.md + delegation gate /implement → /spec)
- **`context/architecture/build-agent-override.md` created**: via `/context harvest` from session 2026-06-05 deprecated-commands-cleanup — documents the build agent override decision
- **`context/index.md` updated**: added reference to build-agent-override ADR
